subcodes.first_line: When the Dove of Separation warbled forth from the City of Eternity, and the Holy Spirit called betwixt earth and heaven, saying: "Embark ye…" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا غنت حمامه الهجر عن مدینه البقا و نادا روح القدس بین الارض و السماء بان ارکبوا
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
